scripts.build:api: pnpm -C packages/attendance-core build && pnpm -C ccalm-api build
scripts.build: pnpm -C ccalm-web build && pnpm -C ccalm-api build
scripts.check: pnpm -C packages/attendance-core build && pnpm -C packages/attendance-core test && pnpm -C ccalm-web check && pnpm -C ccalm-api check
scripts.lint: pnpm -C ccalm-web lint && pnpm -C ccalm-api lint:check
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm -C ccalm-web lint && pnpm -C ccalm-api lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C ccalm-web typecheck && pnpm -C ccalm-api typecheck
scripts.format: pnpm -C ccalm-web format && pnpm -C ccalm-api format
